title: matrix~

messages.description: binary mode: <inlet#, outlet#, on/off>. non-binary mode: <inlet#, outlet#, gain, ramp>
on <dump> messages, rightmost outlet dumps a list with all connections: <inlet#, outlet#, gain>

arguments.description: sets to non-binary mode and the gain value for connections

flags.name: @ramp <float>
flags.description:
only in non-binary mode (if all 3 arguments are given)
default: 10 ms

methods.description: connects any inlet specified by the 1st value to outlet(s) specified by remaining value(s)
disconnects any inlet specified by the 1st value to outlet(s) specified by the remaining value(s)
sets ramp (fade) time - only in non-binary mode
outputs current state of all connections in the rightmost outlet a list: <inlet#, outlet#, gain>
same as dump, but prints on the terminal window
outputs target state of all connections in the rightmost outlet a list: <inlet#, outlet#, gain>

body: [matrix~] routs signals from any inlets to one or more outlets. If more than one inlet connects to an outlet, the output is the sum of the inlets' signals.
